title: French Cheese Omelette
description: A classic French breakfast dish featuring a fluffy omelette filled with melted cheese. It's a simple yet satisfying way to start the day.

ingredients.name: eggs
ingredients.notes: Large eggs are ideal for omelettes

ingredients.name: French cheese
ingredients.notes: Comté or Gruyère work well in this recipe

ingredients.name: butter
ingredients.notes: Unsalted butter is best for this recipe

instructions: Crack the eggs into a bowl and whisk them together with a pinch of salt until the whites and yolks are fully incorporated.
Heat the butter in a small non-stick pan over medium heat until it starts to foam.
Pour the egg mixture into the pan and let it cook for about 2-3 minutes, until the edges start to set.
Sprinkle the shredded cheese over half of the omelette and use a spatula to gently fold the other half over the cheese.
Reduce the heat to low and let the omelette cook for another minute, until the cheese is melted and the eggs are cooked through.
Slide the omelette out of the pan onto a plate and serve hot.
